Create a new analytical theme

Source: R/themes.R
qc_add_theme.Rd

A theme is a patterned, coherent meaning that addresses the research question. It integrates multiple categories or code clusters and should be expressed as an analytical statement (proposition), not merely a label.

Usage

qc_add_theme(
  project,
  name,
  central_concept = "",
  narrative = "",
  definition = "",
  scope = "",
  code_ids = NULL,
  category_ids = NULL,
  created_by = NULL
)

Arguments

project

A qc_project object.

name

Character. Short theme label.

central_concept

Character. The central organizing idea in one sentence.

narrative

Character. Extended analytical justification / proposition.

definition

Character. What counts as belonging to this theme.

scope

Character. Inclusion/exclusion criteria.

code_ids

Integer vector or NULL. Direct code links to create.

category_ids

Integer vector or NULL. Category links to create.

created_by

Character or NULL. Defaults to the current system user.

Value

A one-row tibble: id, name, created_at.
